source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question and provide the correct option letter, e.g., A, B, C, D, at the end.
Question: The transistor used in the circuit shown in <image> has a \( \beta \) of 30 and \( I_{CBO} \) is negligible.
If the forward voltage drop of the diode is 0.7 V, then the current through the collector will be 
Choices 
A. 168 mA 
B. 108 mA 
C. 20.54 mA 
D. 5.36 mA
